steps.title: Need plural possessive
steps.content: The properties belong to multiple nanoparticles. A regular plural noun ending in s forms the possessive with an apostrophe after the final s.

steps.title: Reject apostrophe errors
steps.content: A incorrectly makes "properties" possessive too. B has no possessive apostrophe. D uses singular "nanoparticle's." The remaining form gives the plural possessive for nanoparticles and leaves "properties" as a plain noun. The answer is C.
